cardInfo.name: Italian Cathedral
cardInfo.summary: A travertine-ivory and gilded-gold theme for the Table Seating Planner evoking an Italian cathedral wedding — lapis-blue fresco chrome, basilica gold leaf, a warm marble ground, Renaissance serif lettering, and a quiet Latin-cross motif. Sacred, luminous, and timeless.
cardInfo.notes: Concept — Italian Church. Lapis fresco blue + basilica gold, Renaissance Cormorant serif, warm travertine-marble ground for the Table Seating Planner.
